content: In his essay "Esperanto: European or Asiatic language" Claude Piron has shown the similarities between Esperanto and Chinese, thereby putting to rest the notion that Esperanto is purely eurocentric.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Dejo (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ita:Nel suo saggio Esperanto﹕ lingua europea o asiatica Claude Piron ha evidenziato le somiglianze tra l'esperanto e il cine
